payload.claim_text: Q44 was prioritized for SBS upgrade based on Ridership – Over 29,000 per day on Q44; Key connection between Queens and The Bronx; Main Street offers more opportunity for on-street bus priority
payload.subject: Q44 route

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service benefits: Buses 15-23% faster, 10%+ average increases in ridership in first year, 95%+ customer satisfaction, Better bus stops and connections, Safer streets, Maintain traffic flow

evidence_refs.source_quote: Buses 15-23% faster • 10%+ average increases in ridership in first year • 95%+ customer satisfaction • Better bus stops and connections • Safer streets • Maintain traffic flow

payload.claim_text: Benefits for Community Board 8: Faster bus boarding at every Q44 SBS stop, Real-time bus information screens at busy SBS stops, Transit Signal Priority on Main Street, Faster more reliable bus service to the Bronx Flushing and Jamaica, Traffic improvements near Reeves Avenue
payload.subject: Community Board 8

payload.claim_text: SBS will make fewer stops than Q44 LTD to better serve the busiest stops: 8 fewer stops in The Bronx, 5 fewer stops in Queens, No changes to stops within CB 8

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
